description: Magically bio-engineered beings grafted with animal traits -- living experiments of the Simic Combine.
subraces: Chitinous-armed bruisers with crushing pincers and armored plating across their torsos.
Gill-bearing swimmers with webbed hands and bioluminescent patches for deep-water navigation.
Sticky-fingered leapers scaling walls and snatching prey with an extendable tongue.
Translucent-skinned drifters with trailing tendrils delivering a paralyzing sting.
Multi-armed contortionists squeezing through impossibly tight spaces and grappling with extra limbs.
